description: Escape to the stunning Cebu Island, where azure waters meet golden sands, and adventure awaits at every turn. This tropical paradise is not just about relaxation; it’s a hub for thrilling activities, including swimming with majestic whale sharks and exploring vibrant coral reefs. Over four days, immerse yourself in the natural beauty and rich culture of Cebu, creating unforgettable memories with your partner. Get ready for an active getaway filled with breathtaking landscapes, delicious local cuisine, and the warm hospitality of the Filipino people.

activities.description: Arrive at your resort on Mactan Island, where you can unwind and soak in the tropical atmosphere. Enjoy a welcome drink and get settled in your comfortable room with stunning ocean views.
Savor a delicious lunch at The Cove, a beachfront restaurant offering fresh seafood and local dishes. The relaxing ambiance and ocean breeze make it a perfect spot to start your vacation.
Head to White Beach, known for its powdery white sand and crystal-clear waters. Spend the afternoon swimming, sunbathing, or simply enjoying the beautiful scenery. Don't forget your sunscreen!
As the sun begins to set, find a cozy spot on the beach to watch the breathtaking sunset. The vibrant colors reflecting on the water create a magical atmosphere, perfect for a romantic moment.
Enjoy a delightful dinner at La Vie Parisienne, a charming French restaurant. Indulge in a variety of dishes, from fresh salads to delectable pastries, all while enjoying the cozy ambiance.

transit.memo: Take a bus from Mactan Island to Oslob for the whale shark encounter.

activities.description: Experience the thrill of swimming with gentle whale sharks in Oslob. This unforgettable encounter allows you to get up close with these magnificent creatures in their natural habitat. Remember to follow the guidelines to ensure a safe and respectful interaction with the sharks.
Enjoy a delicious lunch at a local eatery nearby, where you can savor fresh seafood dishes and traditional Filipino cuisine. Try the grilled fish or shrimp, which are local specialties.

After lunch, head to Tumalog Falls, a stunning waterfall surrounded by lush greenery. Take a refreshing dip in the cool waters and enjoy the serene atmosphere. The short hike to the falls is worth the breathtaking views.

Spend the late afternoon relaxing at a nearby beach. Enjoy the soft sand and clear waters, perfect for unwinding after an exciting day. You can also try some beach activities like paddleboarding or simply soak up the sun.

End your day with a romantic dinner at a beachfront restaurant. Enjoy the sunset views while indulging in local dishes and fresh seafood. The ambiance is perfect for couples looking to unwind after a day of adventure.

transit.memo: Travel by boat from Oslob to Moalboal, enjoying the scenic views of the coastline.

activities.activity: Breakfast at The Pleasure Principle Resto-Bar
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at this popular spot known for its delicious pancakes and local dishes. The relaxed atmosphere is perfect for couples looking to enjoy a leisurely meal before their adventure.
Dive into the crystal-clear waters of Pescador Island, famous for its vibrant marine life. Swim alongside colorful fish and, if you're lucky, catch a glimpse of a sea turtle!
Enjoy a delicious seafood lunch at one of the beachfront restaurants in Moalboal. Savor fresh catch of the day while soaking in the stunning ocean views.

Experience an exhilarating canyoneering adventure at Kawasan Falls. Navigate through stunning canyons, jump into refreshing pools, and marvel at the breathtaking waterfalls. A must-do for thrill-seekers!
Unwind at the beautiful White Beach in Moalboal. Enjoy the soft sand and clear waters, perfect for a romantic sunset stroll or simply lounging together.
End your day with a cozy dinner at Ven'z Kitchen, known for its local dishes and friendly service. Try their famous grilled seafood for a taste of the region.

transit.memo: Traveling from Moalboal to Cebu City for sightseeing.

activities.description: Visit the historic Magellan's Cross, a significant landmark in Cebu City that symbolizes the arrival of Christianity in the Philippines. The cross is housed in a small chapel and is surrounded by beautiful murals depicting the history of Cebu.

Explore the vibrant streets of Cebu City, visiting key sites such as the Basilica Minore del Santo Niño and Fort San Pedro. Immerse yourself in the local culture and history as you stroll through these iconic locations.
Enjoy a delicious lunch at Lantaw Native Restaurant, known for its authentic Filipino dishes and stunning views of the ocean. Try their fresh seafood and local specialties for a true taste of Cebu.
Head back to Moalboal to relax and prepare for your next adventure. Enjoy the scenic drive back, taking in the beautiful landscapes of Cebu.

Experience the thrill of snorkeling with whale sharks in Oslob, just a short drive from Moalboal. This unforgettable experience allows you to swim alongside these gentle giants in their natural habitat.
End your day with a delightful dinner at The Pleasure Principle, a cozy restaurant known for its fresh seafood and local dishes. Enjoy the relaxed atmosphere and savor the flavors of Cebu.
Take a leisurely stroll along the beautiful beaches of Moalboal. Enjoy the sunset and the calming sound of the waves, reflecting on your amazing adventures in Cebu.
